title: LEGO Harry Potter Knight Bus Adventure - Wizarding World Toy with 5 Collectible Minifigures plus Accessories incl. Wands - Prisoner of Azkaban Gift for 8+ Year Old Girls & Boys - 76446
features: Magical LEGO Harry Potter toy – Kids can build the iconic Harry Potter Knight Bus toy for 8+ year old girls and boys and recreate scenes from Harry Potter and the Prisoner of Azkaban
5 LEGO Harry Potter characters – Includes LEGO Harry Potter, Ernie Prang, Stan Shunpike and sleeping witch minifigures, plus a Padfoot figure
Detailed LEGO model of the Knight Bus – The upper levels of the bus toy can be detached to access the interior with moving beds and a swinging chandelier
Playful details – The building set includes a lamppost and bench, Harry’s trunk with a Galleon coin element, a letter from Hogwarts and a Daily Prophet newspaper element
Birthday gift for kids – This LEGO Harry Potter building toy is a fun gift for 8+ year old girls, boys and fans of the Wizarding World and LEGO vehicles
Fun way to build – LEGO Builder app guides kids on an intuitive building adventure, where they can zoom in and rotate models in 3D, track progress and save sets
Magical collection – LEGO Harry Potter toys for girls and boys let young witches, wizards and Muggles play out iconic scenes, make up their own stories or display the models
description: From the manufacturer Jedinstvena dečja igračka za magičnu zabavu Krenite svi na uzbudljivu vožnju do sada najdetaljnijim LEGO Harry Potter modelom legendarnog Noćnog viteškog autobusa. Magična igračka – nagrada za decu Ponovo proživite nezaboravne scene iz filma Hari Poter i zatvorenik iz Askabana uz ovaj LEGO avanturistički komplet. LEGO Harry Potter Avantura sa Noćnim viteškim autobusom Jednostavan pristup Odvojte krov i gornje nivoe da vidite unutrašnje detalje. Kreveti Kreveti su dizajnirani da klize. Luster Luster se ljulja kada se autobus kreće. 5 junaka 4 LEGO Harry Potter mini-figure, kao i figura Šaponje. Fenjer i klupa koji se grade Rekonstruišite scenu pre dolaska Noćnog viteškog autobusa. Harijev prtljažnik Nađite pismo iz Hogvortsa i još mnogo toga. Kul igračke za ljubitelje Harija Potera Otkrijte druge sjajne LEGO Harry Potter igračke (prodaju se zasebno) za dečake, devojčice i sve fanove čarobnjačkog sveta.
